allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm", "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)
